pair.title: Set up your FoxESS inverter
pair.subtitle: Enter the FoxESS Cloud connection details for this device.
pair.intro: This app uses the FoxESS Cloud API key and your inverter serial number to poll live values into Homey.

errors.required: Please fill in the device name, API key and serial number.
errors.poll_interval: Poll interval must be at least 60 seconds.

errors.missing_credentials: Missing FoxESS API key or serial number in device settings.
